title: 人工智能工程路线图
author: Beau Carnes
content:
Artificial Intelligence is rapidly transforming industries, and AI Engineers are at the forefront of this revolution. If you’re looking to break into AI Engineering or advance your skills, having a clear roadmap is essential.

Mastering AI requires a blend of mathematics, machine learning, deep learning, and hands-on engineering experience to build and deploy intelligent systems effectively.

We just published a course on the freeCodeCamp.org YouTube channel that provides a comprehensive AI Engineering roadmap, guiding you through the essential skills and techniques you need to master by 2025.

Developed by Tatev Aslanyan from LunarTech, this course covers everything from fundamental mathematics and key machine learning algorithms to large language models, AI best practices, and industry applications. Alongside hands-on implementation in Python, this roadmap also offers invaluable career insights to help you succeed in the evolving AI landscape.

What You’ll Learn in This Course

By the end of this course, you will have a strong foundation in:

  • Mathematical and statistical principles crucial for AI models

  • Data science and machine learning techniques used in AI applications

  • Deep learning fundamentals and practical implementation in Python

  • Generative AI and large language models (LLMs), including fine-tuning

  • Reinforcement learning and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)

  • AI model evaluation, optimization, and ethical considerations

Course Breakdown

This course is designed to provide a structured path into AI Engineering, including:

  • Understanding what AI Engineering is and its real-world applications

  • Learning essential mathematics and statistics for AI development

  • Exploring data science, machine learning, and deep learning methodologies

  • Implementing AI solutions with Python through practical examples

  • Mastering large language models, fine-tuning, and AI optimization techniques

  • Diving into AI ethics, safety, and best practices to ensure responsible AI development

  • Exploring career paths and additional resources for aspiring AI Engineers

This roadmap is perfect for beginners looking to enter AI Engineering, as well as professionals who want to expand their knowledge and stay ahead in the field. Whether you aim to build machine learning models, work with generative AI, or develop cutting-edge AI applications, this course will equip you with the skills you need.

You can watch the full course now on the freeCodeCamp.org YouTube channel (1 hour watch).
aiSummary: 这是一门面向初学者和专业人士的全面人工智能工程路线图课程，涵盖从数学到大型语言模型的核心技能，重点在于实用的 Python 实现、人工智能伦理实践以及职业发展见解。
oneSentenceSummary: 这是一门面向初学者和专业人士的全面人工智能工程路线图课程，涵盖从数学到大型语言模型的核心技能，重点在于实用的 Python 实现、人工智能伦理实践以及职业发展见解。
summary: 本文介绍了由 freeCodeCamp.org 发布的全新人工智能工程课程，该课程由 LunarTech 的 Tatev Aslanyan 开发。这门课程为希望在 2025 年前掌握人工智能工程的初学者和专业人士提供了结构化的学习路径。它不仅涵盖数学、机器学习、深度学习、生成式人工智能和大型语言模型等基础主题，还结合实用的 Python 实现，并关注人工智能伦理和安全指南。此外，它还提供了详细的职业见解，包括行业应用和潜在的职业道路讨论，使其对那些希望进入或在人工智能领域发展的人员非常相关。该课程可在 YouTube 上观看，并通过现实世界的项目和实际案例强调动手实践经验。

mainPoints.point: 实用的 Python 实现提升学习的实用性
mainPoints.explanation: 通过 Python 的实际编码示例，帮助学习者将理论知识有效应用于现实世界的人工智能解决方案，使课程高度实用且引人入胜。

mainPoints.point: 课程涵盖数学和机器学习等人工智能基础
mainPoints.explanation: 课程内容包括数学原理、数据科学技术和机器学习方法，这些对于人工智能开发至关重要，为学习者提供了坚实的基础。

mainPoints.point: 注重人工智能伦理，帮助构建值得信赖且合规的系统
mainPoints.explanation: 课程深入探讨了人工智能伦理和安全指南，涵盖人工智能合规性和安全性等主题，帮助工程师构建值得信赖且合规的系统。

mainPoints.point: 详细的职业见解支持专业成长
mainPoints.explanation: 课程探索了行业应用和潜在的职业道路，为希望进入或在人工智能领域发展的学习者提供了宝贵的指导。

keyQuotes: 掌握人工智能需要融合数学、机器学习、深度学习和动手工程经验，以有效构建和部署智能系统。
这条路线图非常适合希望进入人工智能工程领域的初学者，也适合希望扩展知识并在该领域保持领先地位的专业人士。
您现在可以访问 [freeCodeCamp.org YouTube 频道](https://youtu.be/nYXVvK-Wmn0)，观看完整课程（时长约 1 小时）。
深入研究人工智能伦理、安全和最佳实践，以确保负责任的人工智能开发。
